chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S– 341 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 19.01.2026 Mr. Waqar Ali Bozdar, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with SIP Rafique Ahmed, SHO PS Ubauro >>>>>..<<<<< Statement submitted by SHO PS Ubauro along with police diaries, show that efforts are being made for the arrest of the absconding accused persons; therefore, purpose of the petition is served. If the accused persons are not arrested within reasonable time, the trial Court shall proceed against them u/s 87/88 Cr.PC. With that observation, the petition is disposed of. A copy of this order shall be transmitted to learned trial Court. Judge ARBROHI
